ENABLE

Field Descriptions

dsm_enable

Enable for DAC delta-sigma modulator. Used to reduce quantization noise in AC mode.

dacn_mode

Mode for DACN.

enum frequency_mode_e
DC 0x0
AC 0x1

dacn_enable

Enable for DACN.

dacp_mode

Mode for DACP.

enum frequency_mode_e
DC 0x0
AC 0x1

dacp_enable

Enable for DACP.
